text: A low-volume road or portion thereof which is designated by the town having jurisdiction over such road pursuant to Highway Law § 205-C (Minimum maintenance roads) . * NB Repealed December 8, 2031
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 124 — Minimum maintenance road

A low-volume road or portion thereof which is designated by the town having jurisdiction over such road pursuant to Highway Law § 205-C (Minimum maintenance roads) . * NB Repealed December 8, 2031

*Last modified: Apr. 12, 2024*
